summary: Frontend testing of 5 NEW changes on Dejavoo Terminals page. All 11 test cases PASSED. All requested changes have been implemented correctly.

notes.note: Rate cards Free Placement disclosure shows $99 annual fee (lines 524, 545), while Modal shows $79 (line 225). This may be intentional as requirement #3 specifically said 'modal disclosure'. If rate cards should also show $79, update lines 524 and 545.

test_2_free_placement_disclosure_both_ca.feature: Both Flat Rate AND Dual Pricing boxes have Free Placement disclosure
test_2_free_placement_disclosure_both_ca.verified: Found 2 Free Placement disclosure texts on both cards

test_3_flat_rate_create_account_popup.feature: Create an Account on Flat Rate opens Maverick form popup
test_3_flat_rate_create_account_popup.verified: Clicking button opens popup with iframe src='/maverick-flat-rate.html' and MSC logo

test_4_dual_pricing_create_account_popup.feature: Create an Account on Dual Pricing opens Maverick form popup
test_4_dual_pricing_create_account_popup.verified: Clicking button opens popup with iframe src='/maverick-dual-pricing.html' and MSC logo

test_5_all_terminals_subscribe_now.feature: All 8 terminals show 'Subscribe Now' button (NOT 'Free Placement' or 'Pricing')
test_5_all_terminals_subscribe_now.verified: xerocharge-go, qd4, qd4-dual, qd2, p1, p3, p8, p18 all show 'Subscribe Now'

test_6_xerocharge_go_monthly_fees.feature: XerochargeGO card shows monthly fees: Dual Price $9.99/mo, Flat Rate $14.95/mo
test_6_xerocharge_go_monthly_fees.verified: Both fee texts displayed correctly on XerochargeGO card only

test_7_other_terminals_no_fees.feature: Other terminal cards (QD4, P1, etc.) do NOT show monthly fee text
test_7_other_terminals_no_fees.verified: No monthly fees displayed on qd4, qd4-dual, qd2, p1, p3, p8, p18

test_8_modal_79_annual_fee.feature: Modal disclosure shows $79 annual Advantage Program fee (NOT $99)
test_8_modal_79_annual_fee.verified: Modal contains '$79 annual Advantage Program fee'

test_9_modal_dual_apply_form.feature: Modal Dual Pricing 'Apply Now' opens form popup with MSC logo
test_9_modal_dual_apply_form.verified: Button opens popup with maverick-dual-pricing.html iframe containing MSC logo and form id:1180

test_10_modal_flat_apply_form.feature: Modal Flat Rate 'Apply Now' opens form popup with MSC logo
test_10_modal_flat_apply_form.verified: Button opens popup with maverick-flat-rate.html iframe containing MSC logo and form id:1497

test_11_modal_correct_terminal_name.feature: Modal shows correct terminal name (no stale data regression)
test_11_modal_correct_terminal_name.verified: Opening P18 terminal shows 'P18 Countertop POS' in modal title

critical_code_review_comments: Rate cards (lines 506-548) have Free Placement disclosure with $99 - may need update to $79 if consistency with modal is required
Maverick HTML files have correct form IDs (1180 for Dual, 1497 for Flat Rate) with MSC logo
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 requested changes verified. Tests covered: rate display, Free Placement disclosure, Create Account popups, Subscribe Now buttons, XerochargeGO monthly fees, modal $79 fee, Apply Now form popups with MSC logos, and terminal name display. Cross-origin iframe limitation still exists for Maverick form button styling (noted in iteration_24).
